channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: IEM Atlanta 2026 Tournament Guide—Schedule, Format, and Teams
item.content:encoded:
IEM Atlanta 2026 sees ESL move from its typical North American home of Dallas to Atlanta, Georgia, as teams compete for their share of the $1,000,000 prize pool.

The Counter-Strike event marks the beginning of ESL Grand Slam Season VII after Vitality secured their historic second Grand Slam at IEM Rio 2026.

IEM Atlanta 2026 Schedule and Format

The IEM Atlanta 2026 schedule is as follows:

IEM Atlanta 2026: May 11-17
Group Stage: May 11-14
Playoffs: May 15-17

IEM Atlanta’s format sees two groups of eight lead to a six-team playoff, in the following format:

Group Stage:

  • Two groups of eight teams
  • Double-elimination GSL groups
  • All matches Bo3
  • Group winner advances to the Semi-Finals
  • Second-place and third-place teams advance to the Quarter-Finals

Playoffs:

  • Single-elmination
  • All matches Bo3 except Bo5 Grand Final
  • Third/Fourth place decider before the Grand Final

IEM Atlanta 2026 Teams

IEM Atlanta has a weak top end, with the majority of the top 10 in the Valve Regional Standings instead opting for PGL Astana 2026. Nonetheless, BLAST Fort Worth Grand Finalists Vitality and NAVI are both present.

The IEM Atlanta 2026 team list is:

  • Vitality
  • Natus Vincere
  • FUT
  • Astralis
  • Legacy
  • GamerLegion
  • B8
  • BetBoom
  • FaZe
  • M80
  • Liquid
  • NRG
  • Sinners
  • paiN
  • Passion UA
  • BC.Game

The IEM Atlanta 2026 opening matchups are:

Group A:

  • Vitality vs BC.Game
  • B8 vs BetBoom
  • paiN vs FaZe
  • NRG vs FUT

Group B:

  • NAVI vs Passion UA
  • Sinners vs GamerLegion
  • Legacy vs M80
  • Liquid vs Astralis

Prize Pool:

Prize Pool: $1,000,000
Club Share: $700,000
First Place: $295,000 ($170,000 of which is Club Share)

IEM Atlanta 2026 Location

IEM Atlanta 2026 takes place in Atlanta, Georgia, with fans coming to the Georgia World Congress Center for the playoffs.

The event is part of DreamHack Atlanta, which also features COD Major III, as well as Warzone and Halo tournaments.

How to Watch IEM Atlanta 2026

IEM Atlanta 2026 will be viewable through ESL’s official Counter-Strike YouTube, Twitch, and now Kick streams following the announcement of ESL and Kick’s new partnership. Twitch will also utilize its B stream for Group Stage matches:

  • ESL Counter-Strike YouTube
  • ESLCS Twitch
  • ESLCSb Twitch
  • ESLCS Kick

IEM Atlanta 2026 Predictions

After once again defeating NAVI 3-0 in the Grand Final of BLAST Rivals Fort Worth, Vitality are obvious favourites to pick up their 6th trophy in a row.

For NAVI, getting a map against Vitality would be progress after coming so close on Anubis after blowing an 11-0 lead on Nuke.

The two have relatively simple pathways to the playoffs, with NAVI facing Passion UA, then likely rematching GamerLegion who they defeated 2-0 at BLAST.

Also in Group B, Liquid and Astralis will reignite the organization’s rivalry, but with neither team shining bright. Nonetheless, Astralis’s form should still be strong enough to move them into a matchup against the winner of Legacy and hometown heroes, M80.

For Vitality, their opening matchup will at least be exciting as Mathieu ‘ZywOo’ Herbaut lines up against Oleksandr ‘s1mple’ Kostyliev one more time. Despite those headline names, BC.Game could hardly be in a worse state after removing two of the SAW core, including IGL Christopher ‘MUTIRIS’ Fernandes.

The team still officially only has four players, after Azbayar ‘Senzu’ Munkhbold joined the roster on loan from Passion UA.

Elsewhere in Group A, FaZe will be hoping to build on a relatively positive start at BLAST Fort Worth, which saw the team make the Semi-Finals of the event, securing wins against Furia and G2.

With new coach Niclas ‘enkay J’ Krumhorn, and Russel ‘Twistzz’ Van Dulken IGLing, FaZe did look more stable and structured than the last weeks of Finn ‘karrigan’ Andersen’s reign, but teams will now have tape to look at with this new FaZe roster.

However, FaZe will face a tough test if they progress in the group, with FUT expected to return to full strength after Laurențiu ‘lauNX’ Țârlea missed BLAST Rivals Fort Worth with a suspected stomach ulcer.

With the PGL Bucharest champions seemingly growing in every event they attend, FUT coach András ‘coolio’ Fercsák told Insider Gaming in interview that the team was eyeing the event for arena experience and to see where they are in the Tier 1 landscape.

Predicted Winner: Vitality

You can discuss all things IEM Atlanta 2026 on our community Discord server!
For more Counter-Strike predictions, see our Tournament Guide for PGL Astana 2026.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: All Fortnite Star Wars Droid Tycoon Rebirth Requirements, Listed
item.content:encoded:
Fortnite is awash with Star Wars content, including the debut of several creative maps, and Droid Tycoon has quickly become one of the most-played modes across all of Fortnite.

Epic Games‘ close relationship with Disney has opened the doors for a flood of creative content landing in the game, and Droid Tycoon has the benefit of being supported by Epic directly, alongside several other titles, enhancing the experience to become one of the best Star Wars games out there.

If you’re grinding through Star Wars Droid Tycoon in Fortnite and want to know what Rebirth requirements lie ahead of you, Insider Gaming has all the details.

All Star Wars Droid Tycoon Rebirth Requirements

Rebirth in Star Wars Droid Tycoon requires establishing a set amount of credits, as well as having specific Droids active in your base.

Ticking a Droid off in your Droidex is not enough to meet the requirements, and all required Droids must be active. They don’t need to be working, however, and can be assigned to the rest area.

  • More Insider Gaming: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 End Date, Explained

It’s worth keeping tabs in advance of what you will require for future Rebirth levels, particularly as some of the rarer Droids take a long time to spawn, and the easiest method may be to upgrade Droids you already have, especially as some Droids are required at different Upgrade levels for several Rebirths.

The table below indicates all of the Rebirth requirements in Star Wars Droid Tycoon at each level, making it easier to keep track.

Should You Rebirth in Star Wars Droid Tycoon?

Yes, utilizing the Rebirth feature in Star Wars Droid Tycoon is highly recommended, as it provides huge boosts to credit production and unlocks additional features.

Every Rebirth level you tick off in Star Wars Droid Tycoon provides a boost to the amount of Credits you receive, as well as unlocking additional areas of your base to put Droids to work on.

  • More Insider Gaming: Full Fortnite x Star Wars May 2026 Roadmap

This allows you to maximize your productivity, boosting the Credits you earn further, and creating more room to place Droids, reducing the number of occasions where you’ll be scratching your head on which Droids to keep and which to offload.

Keep an eye out around your base for icons showing the number of Rebirths required to unlock additional slots, making it clear which level you need to hit.

How many Rebirths have you ticked off in Star Wars Droid Tycoon? Share your level in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For your next read, check out all the release details for 007 First Light, and find out about the Sony PlayStation refund lawsuit controversy.

MOBILE APP

item.title: 007 First Light Release Date & All Platforms, Explained
item.content:encoded:
James Bond is already an icon in the gaming industry, and it’s finally time for him to steal the spotlight once again as 007 First Light approaches its release date. Get ready to take on a unique Bond adventure and embark on his journey from an MI6 recruit to becoming a 00 agent.

If that sounds like your cup of tea, you’ll want to know when 007 First Light is set to launch, as well as where you can play it. Thankfully, Insider Gaming has all the details you could be looking for just down below.

When Does 007 First Light Come Out? 007 First Light Release Date, Explained

007 First Light is set to launch on May 27, 2026.

The release date was confirmed during a Sony State of Play last year, but it did face a slight two-month delay, with the original March date left in the dust. However, barring any crazy circumstances, there shouldn’t be any further hold-ups; before long, you’ll be ready to take control of the world’s most famous spy, as you play out his elusive origin story.

  • More Insider Gaming: How Long Is 007 First Light? Game Length & Total Hours, Explained

Partner that narrative with a mix of sandbox missions and linear set pieces, and we should be in for an all-timer Bond adventure. If you’re one of the many wanting to dive in on release day, you’ll want to know the exact moment you can start the game.

007 First Light Exact Start Times

007 First Light will officially launch at 7 AM PT on May 27, 2026.

That gives you all day to attend galas in England and infiltrate nefarious facilities in Iceland, and everything else in between! However, there’s bound to be plenty of you from across the world desperate to play 007 First Light as soon as it releases, so here’s a handy time zone converter, so you know exactly when you can load the game:

Can You Play 007 First Light On PlayStation? PS5 Status, Explained

007 First Light will be a day-one release on the PlayStation 5, though it won’t be available on past-gen platforms.

  • More Insider Gaming: Sony PlayStation Lawsuit Refund: How To Check Eligibility and Claim Your Money

It’s about time we move on from past-gen consoles, and 007 First Light is taking the leap. Considering that the game has appeared during numerous Sony showcases, 007 First Light was always going to appear on the PS5, and owners of the platform can play the game very soon.

Can You Play 007 First Light On Xbox? Xbox Series X|S Status, Explained

Xbox fans don’t need to worry, as 007 First Light is also launching day one on both the Xbox Series X|S.

As was the case with PlayStation, there won’t be any availability for past-gen platforms, but those of you with an Xbox Series X|S can jump into the action straight away.

Can You Play 007 First Light On PC?

007 First Light is also coming to PC, meaning it’s not a console exclusive title.

With GTA 6 buckling down on a console-first release plan, some PC Bond fans might have worried that IO Interactive might take a similar approach. Thankfully, that’s not the case, and the game is readily available on Steam and other storefronts.

Can You Play 007 First Light On Nintendo Switch? Nintendo Switch 2 Status, Explained

007 First Light will be coming to Nintendo Switch 2, but not alongside other platforms.

Nintendo fans, you’ll have to wait a bit longer, as 007 First Light was delayed on the Nintendo Switch 2, with IO Interactive announcing that it will arrive “later this summer.”

  • More Insider Gaming: May 2026 Video Game Releases: Full Schedule and Biggest Games

It’s definitely a shame, and the vague release window might be frustrating for some, but to still see a title of this calibre on a Switch will still be impressive. Given enough time, you could take Bond anywhere and everywhere with you—you could even visit the mission locales in real life whilst playing on handheld!

Are you excited to finally play 007 First Light? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming guides, check out the following:

  • Invincible VS Complete Character Tier List—Best Invincible VS Characters, Ranked
  • All Free Characters in Neverness to Everness & How to Get Them

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Heroic Withdraw from Dota 2 Scene Citing “Unsustainable” Finances
item.content:encoded:
Heroic has announced the cessation of its Dota 2 division, citing “financial results” as the key reason for the decision. Heroic’s Dota 2 roster has now been released by the organization and is therefore free to explore opportunities elsewhere.

Heroic Chief Gaming Officer, Robin Nymann, further explained the decision, stating, “The unfortunate reality is that Dota is a tough game to commercialise, and at Heroic, we have not been able to make it bear fruit for a long time now. I have nothing but faith in this group of people, and the only reason we’ve made this decision is financial.”

The announcement further raises questions about the sustainability of Dota 2 outside of Europe, with even a 5th-6th placement at The International 2025 not saving South America’s best roster from losing its org.

Heroic end historic run for South American Dota 2

Heroic entered Dota 2 in 2024, creating a newly assembled roster of South American talent, featuring Héctor ‘K1’ Rodríguez, João Gabriel ‘4nalog’ Giannini Santos, Elvis ‘Scofield’ Peña, Matheus ‘KJ’ Santos Jungles Diniz, and Belgium’s Cedric ‘Davai Lama’ Deckmyn.

The organization would continue to represent South America through several iterations of the roster, in most cases, providing a pathway to Tier 1 events through South American qualifiers.

The roster would go on to create South American Dota history by winning PGL Wallachia Season 2 in October 2024, finishing 9th-12th at The International 2024, narrowly missing out on the playoffs of the event.

In 2025, Yuma ‘Yuma’ Langlet and Adrián ‘Wipser’ Céspedes Dobles joined the roster in place of K1 and Dalai Lama, signalling the competitive peak of the team.

The roster would go on to place 5th-6th at The International 2025 after a famous Swiss stage recovery, which saw the roster recover from 0-2 to 3-2, making the playoff decider.

After defeating Yakutou Brothers in the decider, Heroic fell to Parivision, before eliminating Tundra in the playoffs, ultimately falling to BetBoom in the Lower Bracket Quarter-Finals.

Shortly after TI 2025, Heroic would pick up the Fissure Universe Episode 7 trophy, marking their last tournament victory in Dota 2.

The roster added Santiago ‘TaiLung’ Olivos Agüero Gustavo and Thiago ‘Thiolicor’ Cordeiro for 2026, decent placements at PGL Wallachia Seasons 7 & 8, and qualifying for DreamLeague Season 29.

However, the roster failed to qualify for ESL One Birmingham and DreamLeague Season 28, falling to PEReject on both instances, hurting the roster’s stature.

Nevertheless, Heroic’s (now former) coach, Igor ‘kaffs’ Estevão, reflected on the season’s results positively, stating, “Competing on tier 1 as a South American team is rough, but even with the setbacks of missing some events, we have had our best season so far, with many 7/8th placements, two 5/6th, one 4th, and a smaller tournament win on top of it.”

Adding, “We have agreed as a group to stay together and hopefully show everyone what we can really do. The future is uncertain, but the objectives remain clear: qualify and perform on EWC and TI.”

Heroic Dota 2 statement in full

“It is with a heavy heart that we today say goodbye to Dota 2 and our amazing team.

Despite competitive success, a growing fanbase, and significant commercial efforts, the financial results ultimately fell short, making it unsustainable for us in the long term.

The players and performance staff have been outstanding ambassadors for HEROIC, delivering results we are proud of.

Together, we made history in Dota, becoming the first South American roster to win a Tier 1 tournament and securing a top 6 finish at The International 2025, and memories that will last.

We want to thank our players, staff, and the community who supported and cheered for us throughout this journey.

All players and staff have been released from their contracts and are free to pursue new opportunities. The roster intends to stay together for upcoming tournaments but will not represent HEROIC.

We wish the team, staff and all our fans the very best, and hope to see all the players compete at tier-1 in the future.”

Is Dota 2 becoming a one-region game? Let us know on our Discord server.
For other news, see the news that Valorant Mobile has now surpassed 10 million daily users.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 5, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 5, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Colorful
  • Hint 2: Explosive
  • Hint 3: Noisy

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Spectacular
  • Explosion
  • Bonfire
  • Celebration
  • Sparkler
  • Festivity
  • Parade
  • Firecracker
  • Pyrotechnics

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 5, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Firework

A Firework is a small container filled with explosive chemicals that produce bright colored patterns or loud noises when they explode.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 6.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion
